name: HRY_PI_DELIVERY_RESULT_DTLS
description: To store the error details or success status for an employee to be transferred to ADP

columns.Name: DELIVERY_RESULT_DTLS_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key to the table hry_pi_delivery_results_dtls

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the table per_all_people_f

columns.Name: DELIVERY_SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores Payroll Action Id of extract Archive Process

columns.Name: DELIVERY_SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Determines the source of the error.

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the table pay_all_payrolls_f

columns.Name: ERROR_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the error code for high-level recognition of the issue.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Stores the error message string as received from vendor / while validating payload to be sent to vendor.

columns.Name: EVENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of event for the request. for example, HIRE.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: A number to uniquely identifify record with combination of MESSAGE_NUMBER.

columns.Name: RESP_MESSAGE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Message identifier from ADP as received from ADP Real time delivery response.

columns.Name: RESP_MESSAGE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Message category from ADP as received from ADP Real time delivery response.

columns.Name: RESP_SEVERITY
columns.Comments: Severity of the error as received from ADP Real time delivery response.

columns.Name: RESP_RECORD_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of record as received from ADP Real time delivery response.

columns.Name: RESP_FUNCTIONAL_AREA
columns.Comments: Description of the type of record as received from ADP Real time delivery response.

columns.Name: RESP_DIAGNOSIS
columns.Comments: Stores the cause of the error generated.

columns.Name: RESP_PROCEDURE
columns.Comments: Stores the remedy of the error.

columns.Name: RESP_EXT_TRANSACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Acknowledgement ID sent as part of ADP Delivery API.

columns.Name: RESP_LOAD_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of whether the newhire 's processing is completed at ADP's end.

columns.Name: RESP_OVERALL_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the result of a particular newhire's processing at ADP's end.

columns.Name: RESP_SET_LSRD
columns.Comments: ADP Response API attribute. Possible values are Y / N.

columns.Name: RESP_RELAUNCHABLE
columns.Comments: ADP Response API attribute. Possible values are Y / N.

columns.Name: RESP_SKIP_REVIEW
columns.Comments: ADP Response API attribute. Possible values are Y / N.

columns.Name: RESP_SKIP_REVIEW_REASON
columns.Comments: ADP Response API attribute for returning the reason to skip review.

columns.Name: RESP_WHO
columns.Comments: Stores the user roles who are eligible to fix the error.

columns.Name: NEW_HIRE_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Email address of the newly hired employee.

columns.Name: HR_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Email address of the HR representative.

columns.Name: PAY_ADMIN_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Email address of the Payroll Administrator.

columns.Name: LINE_MANAGER_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Email address of the Line Manager.

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Email address of the Actionees to be notified.

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date when the notification was generated.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the error, i.e. the stage of rectification where it is currently in.

columns.Name: SUBMITTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when the status is generated and recorded.

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Stores the message body to be sent as part of the notification.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the table per_enterprises

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
